channel.title: NAQ Ma, R Li, W Pan, W Huang, B Liu, Y Xie, Z Wang, C Li, H Jiang, J Huang, Y Shi, J Dai, K Zheng, X Li, M Hui, L Fu, Z Yang | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAQ Ma, R Li, W Pan, W Huang, B Liu, Y Xie, Z Wang, C Li, H Jiang, J Huang, Y Shi, J Dai, K Zheng, X Li, M Hui, L Fu, Z Yang

image.title: NAQ Ma, R Li, W Pan, W Huang, B Liu, Y Xie, Z Wang, C Li, H Jiang, J Huang, Y Shi, J Dai, K Zheng, X Li, M Hui, L Fu, Z Yang

item.title: Phillyrin (KD-1) exerts anti-viral and anti-inflammatory activities against novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) and human coronavirus 229E (HCoV-229E) by suppressing the nuclear factor kappa B (NF-κB) signaling pathway.
